extortion.description: At Elutia we’re pioneering the future of patient care. Our proprietary drug-eluting biomaterial platforms stand at the forefront of medical innovation. We are dedicated to addressing the pressing challenges that can arise from medical device implant failures. By combatting post-surgical complications that impact patient outcomes and escalate medical costs, we’re ensuring patients not only recover, but thrive without compromise.SITE: www.elutia.com Address : 12510 Prosperity Drive, Suite 370 Silver Spring, MD 20904 USA Tel#: 240-247-1170ALL DATA SIZE: ≈550gb+ 1. Employee Personnel Files… 2. Corporate data: Finance, Payroll, HR… 3. Tax forms, passports, personal, confidential docs, scans… 4. R&D docs & etc…
